title: NewReleaseEvent
description: Published by Music Service after a creator successfully uploads and publishes a new song (S3 confirmed + DB committed). Consumed by Notification Service for fan-out to followers.

event_id.description: Unique event identifier (UUID v4). Used as idempotency key.

version.description: Schema version. Always 'v1' for this schema.

timestamp.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp of when the event was generated (e.g. 2026-04-15T10:05:00.000Z).

correlation_id.description: Distributed tracing ID propagated from the originating HTTP request (creator's upload request).

artist_id.description: UUID of the creator (artist) who uploaded the song.

artist_name.description: Display name of the artist. Used in notification message body (e.g. 'Son Tung M-TP released a new song').

song_id.description: UUID of the newly published song.

song_title.description: Title of the song. Used in notification message body.

album_id.description: UUID of the album this song belongs to. Null if the song is a standalone single.

genre_ids.description: List of genre UUIDs for this song. Used by Notification Service to target genre-interested followers.

mood_tags.description: Optional mood/vibe tags (e.g. ['energetic', 'focus']). Reserved for future recommendation context.

thumbnail_url.description: CDN URL for the song/album thumbnail image. Used directly in notification payload.

s3_storage_key.description: Internal S3 object key for the audio file (e.g. 'audio/2026/04/{song_id}.mp3'). Consumers MUST NOT expose this value externally.

duration_sec.description: Total duration of the song in seconds.

explicit.description: Whether the song contains explicit content. Used for content filtering in notification targeting.
